findings.evidence: Line 130 declares `theorem continuous_timeSlice {F : ℝ≥0 × W → ℂ} (hF : Continuous F) ...` under only `[TopologicalSpace W]`; the only BCR-specific public use is the wrapper at lines 138-141.
findings.fix: Move the public lemma to an earlier/general topology-continuity file, or make it private/local here and expose only the semigroup-group wrapper if no reusable topology API is intended.
findings.issue: `TauCeti.continuous_timeSlice` has no positive-definite or semigroup-group hypotheses, so exporting it from `PositiveDefinite/SemigroupGroupTimeSlice` hides broadly useful topology API in a roadmap-specific BCR file.

summary: Most semigroup-group slice API is in the expected PositiveDefinite/SemigroupGroup extension area, but the PR exposes a generic product-continuity theorem from a BCR-specific file.
